name: Rogz Dog Utility Fixed Lead/Leash Small - Blue
shortDescription: Rogz Utility Fixed Lead/Leash – Small Blue
description: Rogz Utility Fixed Reflective Dog Lead/Leash has a reflective yarn woven into the webbing for night time visibility so that everyone is aware that you & your dog are on an outing. Key Features: Reflective Stitching: Reflective yarn is woven into the webbing for night time visibility. RogLoc: RogLoc is the Fort Knox of release buckle Low Load Technology: LLT technology reduces the load on the Titanium Plastic buckle through a cleverly positioned load ring Contoured Plastic Component: ROGZ rounded contoured plastic components ensure that every ROGZ collar fits snugly Die-cast ring: Custom designed die cast ring (no welding). Electroplated chrome for a tarnish free finish Size: Length 1.8m, Width 1.1cm
